(*English:* "The Star"), also known as **Ancón**,[[1]](#cite_note-Betancur1925-1) is a station on line A of the [Medellín Metro](/wiki/Medell%C3%ADn_Metro "Medellín Metro") going south.[[2]](#cite_note-Michelin2011-2) It is located in the [La Estrella](/wiki/La_Estrella,_Antioquia "La Estrella, Antioquia") municipality of Colombia. It was inaugurated on September 17, 2012 as part of the extension of the line from [Itagüí](/wiki/Itag%C3%BC%C3%AD_station "Itagüí station") in a ceremony attended by the current president of Colombia, [Juan Manuel Santos](/wiki/Juan_Manuel_Santos "Juan Manuel Santos"); Governor of Antioquia, [Sergio Fajardo](/wiki/Sergio_Fajardo "Sergio Fajardo"); and Medellin Mayor [Aníbal Gaviria](/wiki/An%C3%ADbal_Gaviria "Aníbal Gaviria").[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-urbanrail-5)

**La Estrella** (*English:* "The Star"), also known as **Ancón**,[[1]](#cite_note-Betancur1925-1) is a station on line A of the [Medellín Metro](/wiki/Medell%C3%ADn_Metro "Medellín Metro") going south.[[2]](#cite_note-Michelin2011-2) It is located in the [La Estrella](/wiki/La_Estrella,_Antioquia "La Estrella, Antioquia") municipality of Colombia. It was inaugurated on September 17, 2012 as part of the extension of the line from [Itagüí](/wiki/Itag%C3%BC%C3%AD_station "Itagüí station") in a ceremony attended by the current president of Colombia, [Juan Manuel Santos](/wiki/Juan_Manuel_Santos "Juan Manuel Santos"); Governor of Antioquia, [Sergio Fajardo](/wiki/Sergio_Fajardo "Sergio Fajardo"); and Medellin Mayor [Aníbal Gaviria](/wiki/An%C3%ADbal_Gaviria "Aníbal Gaviria").[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-urbanrail-5)

This station was designed as part of the larger project "Centrality South" for the metropolitan area to meet the needs of the inhabitants of southern [Valle de Aburrá](/wiki/Valle_de_Aburr%C3%A1 "Valle de Aburrá"). Currently, it is the only semi-underground station.[[6]](#cite_note-6)
